payload.note: The deterministic decision is to escalate based on a strong corroboration of identity with the screened party. The evidence includes address support, country match, entity type alignment, exact date of birth verification, exact passport identifier match, and normalized name confirmation, all contributing to a high data sufficiency score and match strength.
evidence_summary: Address, country, and entity type support the match.
Exact date of birth match with screened party.
Exact identifier match on passport supports true positive identification.
Exact normalized name match corroborates individual identity.
payload.next_step_rationale: Escalate for analyst review due to strong data sufficiency and no contradictions.
